channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bumblebees solve problems like chimps and elephants despite tiny brains
item.description: New research suggests the fuzzy insects may be capable of spontaneously solving problems the way animals with much larger brains do.

item.title: At least 12 shot at Ohio festival; search for suspects continues, police say
item.description: Gunfire erupted Saturday near a busy street festival in Ohio, wounding at least 12 people and sending some eventgoers scrambling for cover while others fled.

item.title: AIDS workers in Africa feel impact of U.S. foreign aid changes
item.description: Health providers in South Africa and Mozambique report that cancellation or redirection of U.S. PEPFAR funding under the Trump administration has already affected their work.

item.title: One million people fill Madrid streets for pope's flower-carpeted procession
item.description: The crowd cheered and shouted "This is the youth of the pope!" as Pope Leo arrived for Mass at a central Madrid plaza. It is the first papal visit to S...
